g.text: Harness for AI-Agentic Operator Code Analysis & Programming Model
Architecture: compiler tools, static analysis, and programming-model constraints for agentic operator tuning

text.tspan: Give the AI agent structured knowledge
architecture so it can analyze, modify,
and optimize code more effectively and
Extract useful views from compiler and
Build an AI-friendly IR and legal
Pass knowledge, context, and constraints to
Let the agent propose code/model changes.
axes, tile sizes, core split, tail policy,
time, AI Core utilization, bandwidth, stalls,
• Metrics and cost model as part of the model
☑ Agent reasons over structure, not only text.
☑ Smaller search space and fewer mistakes.
☑ Reusable patterns accumulate in the skill bank.
☑ The programming model evolves toward the domain.

g.text: compiler tools + static analysis + structured views + programming-model constraints
help the AI agent optimize operator code with measurable speedups and checkable correctness.
